---
name: Feature Request / 功能请求
about: Suggest an idea for this project / 为此项目提出想法
title: "feat: "
labels: "enhancement"
assignees: ""
---

# Feature Request / 功能请求

**Describe the Feature Request / 描述功能请求**

<!-- A clear and concise description of what the feature request is. Please include if your feature request is related to a problem. / 清晰简洁地描述功能请求是什么。如果功能请求与某个问题相关，请说明。 -->

**Describe Preferred Solution / 描述首选解决方案**

<!-- A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. / 清晰简洁地描述你希望发生什么。 -->

**Describe Alternatives / 描述替代方案**

<!-- A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered. / 清晰简洁地描述你考虑过的任何替代解决方案或功能。 -->

**Related Code / 相关代码**

<!-- If you are able to illustrate the bug or feature request with an example, please provide it here. / 如果可以用示例说明功能请求，请在此提供。 -->

**Additional Context / 附加上下文**

<!-- List any other information that is relevant to your issue. Stack traces, related issues, suggestions on how to add, use case, Stack Overflow links, forum links, screenshots, OS if applicable, etc. / 列出与问题相关的其他信息。堆栈跟踪、相关 issue、添加建议、用例、Stack Overflow 链接、论坛链接、截图、操作系统（如适用）等。 -->

**If the feature request is approved, would you be willing to submit a PR? / 如果功能请求被批准，你愿意提交 PR 吗？**
Yes / No _(Help can be provided if you need assistance submitting a PR / 如果需要帮助提交 PR，我们可以提供协助)_
